## Education

```{r}
keep_roles <- c(
  "PhD Programme in Biomedicine",
  "M.Sc. in Quantitative and Computational Biology",
  "B.Sc. in Biotechnology",
  "Graduate Certificate in Theoretical Statistics and Probability",
  "Diploma de Experto Universitario en Métodos Avanzados de Estadística Aplicada"
)
render_affiliations(cv_data$educations[role %in% keep_roles])
```
